title: Visible Rich Scorched Dirt - BTA 7.3
description: More noticeable Rich Scorched Dirt - for BTA 7.3
body:
Makes the Rich Scorched Dirt more noticeable and easier to distinguish from the regular scorched dirt.

[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visible-orange-rich-scorched-dirt-bta-7.3) for a Version of the Pack using the previous more Orange Textures.

![easy to spot Rich Scorched Dirt in the desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bee73f318290345543498c03f889606c653b1cf_0.webp)

‼️ **This Resource pack is for the Better Than Adventure Mod for minecraft Beta 1.7.3**
[Link to The BTA's Website](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/)
